station.settingsDesc: Configure currency and fuel recording method for your station
station.name: Station Name
station.isNozzle: Record Sales by Nozzle Reading (End − Start)
station.isNozzleHint: When ON, fuel quantity is calculated automatically: New Reading − Old Reading = Liters Sold. Staff enter the nozzle meter's new and old readings instead of typing a quantity.
station.isNotNozzleHint: When OFF, staff enter the quantity sold (liters) directly. No nozzle meter readings required.
station.successDesc: Station settings have been saved successfully.
station.errorDesc: Failed to update station settings. Please try again.
